title: Why Do Whispers Fly?
poem_text:
Why do whispers fly so high?
Do they tickle clouds up in the sky?

Can a giggle shake the trees?
Does it bounce off buzzing bees?

Why won’t shadows hold still?
Do they dance on window sills?

If a star could sneeze so bright,
Would the night turn pink and light?

Tell me, why do dreams take flight?
Do they ride the moon all night?
cover_context: A glowing bedroom where shadows stretch like dancers and whispers float upward as tiny, sparkling fireflies.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, acoustic guitar and lo-fi beat, 116 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
